name: io.github.codespar/mcp-braintree
description: MCP server for Braintree (PayPal) — global card processing via GraphQL. Authorize/charge/capture/refund/void, vault, customers, client tokens.

environmentVariables.name: BRAINTREE_MERCHANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Braintree merchant id (from the Control Panel > API).

environmentVariables.name: BRAINTREE_PUBLIC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Braintree public API key — Basic auth username.

environmentVariables.name: BRAINTREE_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Braintree private API key — Basic auth password (secret).
